talents.descriptionTemplate:
Horla's "Strike" and "Defend" Command Cards are treated as Psalms.
When Horla's Command Cards trigger their {Leap} Effect, she enters the {Emotion} state associated with that Psalm. Horla can only have one {Emotion} state active at a time, and triggering a different Psalm's {Leap} Effect will change the {Emotion} state to the corresponding {Emotion}. The {Emotion} state persists throughout the exploration.
For every 1% {Death Resistance} Horla has, the passive effect value of Horla's current {Emotion} state +0.1% of the original value.

builds.label: Core
builds.summary: Sparse early guide content; prioritize Realm Mastery wheels while Arachne recommendations settle.

annotation.notes: Damage amplifier and harbinger of doom — her Rouse and Pursuit multiply the team's command cards, with big DMG-Amp buffs and shields. Final Verdict out-damages many DPS while ignoring shields and invulnerability, trivializing many boss mechanics; best supporting a card-rich DPS but can solo many fights.
annotation.leapNote: Triggers Singularity: Ultra — command cards are buffed, Ultra Round extends the current turn instead of starting a new one, and Annihilation puts the leftmost Ultra-Space card into hand on a 3-turn cooldown.
annotation.divineRealmNote: Singularity: Ultra. Exalt 'Moira, As I Decree' costs 150 Aliemus; Weaver stacks (cap 3, expanded at E3), Singularity Beacon/Prism, and Final Verdict damage that ignores shields and invulnerability.

annotation.notes: Protective Aequor support built around Gaunt cards: Skill 2 shields and summons Gaunts (Insights/aliemus, enemy STR down + tentacle power, or a lowest-HP hit with a team crit DMG buff); the ult applies AOE STR down and executes the lowest-HP enemy, minting a permanent Gaunt on a kill (max 3 per battle, must be his own damage — corrosion or Arachne mercy kills don't count). Skill 1 is a guaranteed-crit AOE that eats all Arithmetica and batteries aliemus. Fixed damage (ult/Gaunt hit) scales off Tentacle DMG and STR and never crits; his crit DMG stat feeds Skill 1 and the team buff. Best in Aequor but exports STR down, crit DMG, and vermin clearing anywhere. E2+E3 needed for comfortable play; OE triples damage.

contentNotes.arc2: Astral Reign limited unit — plays as protective support; his damage only ramps against bosses as team STR/tentacles scale.
